data.title: Alibaba expected to report earnings at $1.95/share on $34.26B revenue. Autodesk raises full-year guidance.
data.description: US stock futures are down this morning, and investors are eyeing key stocks. Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. (NYSE: BABA) is expected to announce earnings of $1.95 per share on revenue of $34.26 billion. After hours, Alibaba shares climbed 0.5% to $120.20. Autodesk Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK) surpassed expectations in its second-quarter financial results. The company raised its full-year guidance from $6.92-$7 billion to $7.03-$7.08 billion, against a $6.97 billion estimate. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Gevo's RNG subsidiary refinances $40 million debt with new bond sales, strengthening the company's balance sheet. Balancesheet liquidity increased by $30 million.
data.description: Gevo, Inc. (NASDAQ: GEVO) based in Englewood, Colorado, recently announced the purchase of $40 million non-recourse tax-exempt private activity bonds by Barclays Capital Inc. The bonds, known as the “2025 Bonds,” were issued by the Iowa Finance Authority on behalf of Gevo’s subsidiary, Gevo NW Iowa RNG, LLC (“Gevo RNG”). This transaction resulted in the refinancing of $40 million from the previously issued Iowa Finance Authority Solid Waste Facility Revenue Bonds (Gevo NW Iowa RNG, LLC Renewable Natural Gas Project), Series 2021 (Green Bonds), valued at $68.2 million. These bonds were backed by an irrevocable direct pay letter of credit. By refinancing, Gevo was able to unlock $40 million of restricted cash securing the letter of credit, boosting its balance sheet liquidity by around $30 million following expenses related to the 2025 Bonds.

data.title: Noah Holdings Limited reports strong Q2 2025 earnings, driven by improved investor sentiment and growing overseas momentum.
data.description: On August 29, 2025, in Shanghai, a prominent wealth management service provider called Noah Holdings Limited, known as Noah, revealed its latest achievements. The company, listed on both the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: NOAH) and the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX: 6686), offers a wide range of advisory services related to global investment and asset allocation with a focus on the global Chinese community.

data.title: FLOKI projected to hit $0.000108 in Sept 2025 despite bearish trends. Analysts predict range of $0.0000865-$0.000108.
data.description: The predicted price of FLOKI is uncertain, with analyst projections varying between $0.0000865 and $0.000108. Technical analysis indicates a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 42.35, while the bearish momentum of the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) signals a need for caution moving forward.

data.title: Unions believe Zohran Mamdani's economic message can guide Democrats in reaching working-class voters after his Democratic mayoral nomination in NYC.
data.description: Unions believe there is a promising opportunity for Democrats to reconnect with working-class voters through Zohran Mamdani's economic platform, which played a significant role in his securing the Democratic mayoral nomination in New York City.

data.title: In 2024, new REALTORS are more diverse than experienced ones - trends seen in the NAR Member Profile.
data.description: The 2024 NAR Member Profile reveals an interesting trend - new REALTORS® joining the association are more diverse compared to veteran members. This indicates a shift towards inclusivity, with a significant number of new members representing different backgrounds and demographics. The data underlines the evolving landscape of the real estate industry, with diversity becoming increasingly prominent among professionals. This trend reflects a positive step towards greater representation and inclusivity within the NAR community.

data.title: Trump wants Federal Reserve to cut borrowing costs to lower mortgage rates for homebuyers.
data.description: President Donald Trump is advocating for the Federal Reserve to reduce borrowing costs in order to lower mortgage rates for potential homebuyers.

data.title: Unemployment falls, defies expectations; Fed rate cut odds decrease; S&P 500 rises. Significant impact on market sentiment.
data.description: The unemployment rate is predicted to reach its highest level since October 2021. The latest jobs report showed a decrease in the likelihood of a Federal Reserve rate cut, as unemployment numbers fell. In response, the S&P 500 experienced a rise.

data.title: Pure Harvest Corporate Group (OTC: PHCG) eliminates debt, achieving financial restructuring milestone for strategic growth phase.
data.description: Pure Harvest Corporate Group (OTC: PHCG) has recently achieved a significant financial milestone by becoming completely free of debt. This major achievement comes as part of the Company's ongoing financial restructuring efforts. With this development, Pure Harvest Corporate Group is now in a favorable financial position.

data.title: GTJAI (1788.HK) hits all-time high revenue in H1 2025, following stable growth strategy.
data.description: In the initial six months of 2025, Guotai Junan International Holdings Limited (GTJAI) stayed committed to its strategic focus on "Advancing from Stability Towards Innovation." As a part of Guotai Haitong Group, GTJAI (1788.HK) emphasized a prudent business approach, concentrating on managing risks effectively. The company enhanced its diverse business functions and promoted innovation initiatives during this period.
